texto: What do you think, Galen?" Lady Fern asked in a sugary voice.Galen chewed slowly and painfully, swallowing tentatively.It's very unique," he said, trying to look intrigued instead of disgusted. "It's excellent."Lady Fern looked satisfied and turned to say something to her husband, while Galen added quietly under his breath, "...not."--The Fire Stone
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Riley Carney que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “What do you think, Galen?" Lady Fern asked in a sugary voice.Galen chewed slowly and painfully, s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, food, funny, com foco em funny e lady-fern.
